Member Function Documentation

◆ computeSurfaceContact() [1/2]

virtual void ISurfaceUtils::computeSurfaceContact ( ISurfacePair *  surface_pair,
FaceFaceContactList &  contact 
)
pure virtual

compute for each face of master surface the nearest face of slave surface

where surface_pair describe (master,slave) surfaces pair

◆ computeSurfaceContact() [2/2]

virtual void ISurfaceUtils::computeSurfaceContact ( ISurfacePair *  surface_pair,
NodeFaceContactList &  contact,
const NodeFaceProjection  direction 
)
pure virtual

compute for each node of a surface the nearest face on the other surface

surfaces are given by a pair (surface1, surface2) direction defines if surface1 is the source (Direction) or the target (ReverseProjection)
